figures.caption: Figure 5. Comparison of Overall Accuracy Values of Five CNN Models Trained Using RGB, Thermal And RGB+Thermal Training Sets. The comparisons presented in the Table 3-5 and Figure 5 demonstrate that the multimodal approach outperforms the single-modality approaches and that the VGG16 model is the most robust architecture evaluated in this study, particularly when trained on the RGB+Thermal dataset. Therefore, further analyses were conducted exclusively on this model. Class-wise performance results for each fold in the 5-fold cross-validation are reported in Table 6.
